query: UPDATE workflow_settings SET value = JSON_SET(value, '$.socialLinks', JSON_OBJECT('facebook', 'https://www.facebook.com/adamhwilder', 'instagram', 'https://www.instagram.com/adamhwilder/', 'linkedin', 'https://www.linkedin.com/in/adamhwilder/', 'youtube', 'https://www.youtube.com/@adamhwilder')) WHERE `key` = 'branding';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mfUemcUDe4dZgvy.root --database 5aXJgJ23doBv7KCYS3YtvX --execute UPDATE workflow_settings SET value = JSON_SET(value, '$.socialLinks', JSON_OBJECT('facebook', 'https://www.facebook.com/adamhwilder', 'instagram', 'https://www.instagram.com/adamhwilder/', 'linkedin', 'https://www.linkedin.com/in/adamhwilder/', 'youtube', 'https://www.youtube.com/@adamhwilder')) WHERE `key` = 'branding';
